I love alhaitham !! so much ugh.. i just haven't had much inspo for a bot for him bit expect to see a few every now and then. i checked my most popular bot and its at 9.6k chats?? and its jun.. i loved making him but im not shocked the nsfw scenario i made of him is the most popular

scenario: just based on stuff i see with haikaveh (1 of the best ships btw, argue with the wall !!!) where haitham goes from small and just being users junior to being users junior that is like 2x bigger (exaggeration unless you are short as fuck like me and everyone is giant compared to you) size difference !!!! mmmmmmmmmmmmm.

i have been contemplating just not using the fancy little decoration thing at the start of this.. should i do that?? its easier than copy pasting it every time and i can just include the quote thing without it edit: reposted this since jai has been tweaking so much and finally might let this show on my profile. also i made a twt specifically for jai and you can access it on my strawpage, it is priv though so i will have to approve.
